name: Havrin Brixol
description:
Age: 20
Species/Race: Zestyr
Pronouns: He/They
Sexuality: Heterosexual

📸 Appearance
Hair Color & Style: Ashy greige (#b0a984) outer layers with jet-black roots/under-layers; messy textured wolf-cut/mullet-adjacent with spiky, unkempt tufts; black snapback worn loosely (brim underside neon-lime). Lemon-slice pins and dark green citrus foliage on the left side.
Eye Color & Shape: Piercing amber-gold (#e1b13d), tsurime (up-tilted) shape—sharp, focused, high-luster.
Skin Tone: Warm medium-tan / light bronze (#c5a07f), healthy warmth.
Height: 5'4".
Build/Physique: Petite but athletic and nimble; compact, with strong lower legs for quick bursts.
Clothing Style: Citrus-techwear—oversized neon chartreuse/lime windbreaker with wide standing collar and black utility straps; tight black turtleneck underneath; dark grey/taupe high-waisted bermuda cargo shorts with paper-bag waist; crossbody harness/strap; chunky high-top tech sneakers in lime/black/white with thick sculpted soles.
Notable Features: Lemon-slice dangling earring and multiple piercings in left ear; glowing golden-yellow potion flask clipped to belt; large adhesive bandage on left shin; silver carabiner on belt; neon lime trim and a yellow zipper pull.
Aura/First Impression: Cool, sporty, tech-savvy — a streetwise courier with citrus-edge style.
Typical Expression: Stoic, reserved, slight bored-cool smirk; eyes constantly assessing.

🧊 Personality
Core Traits: Calm, efficient, observant, low-drama; quietly competitive and steady under pressure.
Charm Type: Tomboyish composure—attracts via competence, cool restraint, and small, deliberate gestures.
Flaws/Vulnerabilities: Keeps feelings guarded; can seem aloof or hard to read; avoids relying on others until pushed.
Love Language(s): Acts of service and practical help; shared quiet moments and reliability.
How He Flirts: Subtle actions—covering someone with his jacket, offering a crafted citrus drink, small teasing remarks rather than grand displays.
Hidden Sides: Soft spot for handmade gifts and ritualized routines; secretly enjoys bright, cheerful things despite the tough exterior.
Catchphrases/Quirks: Flicks the brim of his cap when thinking; tucks a lemon slice behind his ear absentmindedly; tightens the carabiner as a calming ritual.

🗺️ Background
Origin: Vertical neon neighborhoods and transit corridors of Thalassor’s tech-district.
Family/Social Status: Working-class roots; grew up around market stalls and maintenance yards.
Occupation/Role: Night courier / tech-runner and small beverage tinkerer — known for speedy runs and a signature glowing lemonade flask.
Special Talents/Skills: Parkour and urban navigation, expert route-reading, quick mechanical fixes, improvisational gadgetry (harness and strap rigs).
Education: Street-trained; apprenticed under a local runner collective and learned basic alchemy/tinkering from a market elder.
Personal Goal: To perfect his energy elixir recipe and build a reliable micro-network of runners to protect his neighborhood.
Backstory Highlights: Salvaged his first harness from an abandoned workshop; earned respect after pulling off a blind-route run that saved a stalled shipment in a surveillance sweep.

🖤 Relationships
Best Friend(s): A soft-spoken mechanic who mods his gear and a rooftop lookout who warns of patrols.
Crush/Love Interest: A quiet street-food vendor whose calm steadiness contrasts his restless pace.
creator: abbey
